invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格突破$950（日高阻力），或费率Z值降至50%以下（轧多风险缓解）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks above $950 (daily high resistance), or funding Z-score drops below 50% (long squeeze risk eases).

invalidation.zh: 失效条件：价格跌破$3280（支撑位），或费率Z值回升至-50%以上（轧空机会消失）。
invalidation.en: Invalidation condition: price breaks below $3280 (support level), or funding Z-score rises above -50% (short squeeze opportunity disappears).
